title: madhuca butyracea
intro: Madhuca butyracea, also known as Mahua, is a large deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent. The tree has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Madhuca butyracea include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the tree's flowers, seeds, and leaves are used to make medicines, tonics, and oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
